context.description:
Since 2024, I've been leading design and product strategy at Codedex, an early-stage startup that's building a platform to make learning to code feel as fun and immersive as playing an RPG game. At Codédex, I've been the first and only designer operating within a tiny team of <10 employees, building scalable systems under tight resources to transform a scrappy, [early prototype](https://www.producthunt.com/products/codedex/launches/codedex?utm_source=other&utm_medium=social) into a [full-fledged platform](https://www.producthunt.com/products/codedex/launches/codedex-v1-0) loved by a community of 1.6+ million learners.

![Codedex homepage](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/2ODRGrHBMUTop5EntrLmdd/ba35d6201f3d9619f376e69f1c88b7e2/codedex_homepage.gif) ![Codedex learning environment](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/nTo8r8Mry68m5Rb37occ1/6862af270f86668689f7f3fde9195709/chrome-capture-2026-5-19.gif) ![Codedex AI feedback](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/1QruFh8GZ8aJf2QQHF52CQ/4772ad9a0b69244aebab9083920d3735/chrome-capture-2026-5-19__1_.gif) ![codedex chapter complete](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/6aAH1hrSQIXJJo7c4tj171/35262f9a15e9c7870702769c8876c937/codedex_chapter_complete.gif) ![Character customizer](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/53uvgbUlYNz6RWIaQIQaYB/95085fb8f48197557d4ed4b9d8ca6728/chrome-capture-2026-5-19__2_.gif) ![codedex 30 nites of code onboarding](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/1L7L7ZOZH42bIURCFXAmw9/125f47ce9eb37ca2532656fd8e8cae6c/codedex_30_nites_of_code_onboarding.gif) ## Some highlights: - __July 2024:__ Establishing Codédex's first ever design system, featuring custom pixel art inspired UI elements (hacked together with CSS tricks by yours truly) - __Dec 2024:__ Implementing changes to increase new user signups by 8% and launched an onboarding experience with an 86% completion rate - __Jan 2025:__ Designing on-site [community features](https://www.codedex.io/blog/community-redesign), such as discussion channels, leaderboards, and a platform for participate in community coding challenges - __April 2025:__ Designing a gamified, [tamagotchi-inspired feature](https://www.codedex.io/blog/30-nites-of-code-revamp-2025) for committing to a 30 day learning challenge - __Jan-July 2025:__ Working with my friend [MeeNa Ko](https://www.moaw.art/) to create new, world-building, pixel art animations for our landing page and a few of our most popular courses (including much of the art in this page) - __July 2025:__ Systematizing the design of the learning environment to reduce bug reports, fix navigation issues, convey learning progress, and add moments for immersive storytelling as part of our [v1.0 launch](https://www.codedex.io/blog/codedex-v1) - __September 2025:__ Scoping, designing, and testing an integrated AI-powered learning experience that includes an code evaluation system and a help feature personalized to the lesson context and the user's code. - __November 2025:__ Designed a character customizer that allows learners to create unique, pixel art avatars using spritesheets and color swapping.
context.shortDescription: Leading design and product for an early-stage startup that makes learning to code feel like an adventure.
context.title: Codédex
